title: Animal Licenses - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Animal Licenses 19 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BRIGHTSIDE ANIMAL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelter and adoption services for displaced animals, microchipping services, and a pet food bank that people can access every 3 months. Also sells Deschutes County dog licenses at cost. This is a no-kill shelter. All animals have been spayed and neutered. 1355 NE Hemlock Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday/Saturday 11am-5:30pm, Thursday 11am-5pm Email (541) 923-0882 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF BOARDMAN ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services such as responding to reports of local animal code violations and dog licensing. Do not respond to reports of at large chickens. 200 City Center Circle Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 676-5317 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF EUGENE CITY OF EUGENE POLICE HEADQUARTERS CITY OF EUGENE ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services, fields complaints, issues dog licenses, and enforces Eugene Animal Code. 300 Country Club Road Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 687-4060 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY DOG SERVICES DOG SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adoption of dogs, picks up strays, handles nuisance complaints, and provides licensing services. Also offers microchipping and rabies vaccinations for licensed dogs. 13141 SE Highway 212 Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Administration: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Adoption Viewing: Tuesday-Friday 1pm-4pm Email (503) 655-8628 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CROOK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services including criminal investigation, search and rescue operations, and animal licensing. 308 NE 2nd Street Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 447-6398 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DOUGLAS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services which includes cruelty investigations, stray pets, code enforcement, and dog licensing. 1036 SE Douglas Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 440-4471 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GREENHILL HUMANE SOCIETY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal adoptions; reunification services; emergency boarding in crisis situations such as domestic violence, medical emergencies, disaster response, and other situations determined to be such; spay/neuter services for feral cats; a pet food pantry; foster care; humane education; dog licenses; and volunteer opportunities. 88530 Green Hill Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 11am-6pm Email (541) 689-1503 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY SPAY/NEUTER CLINIC DOG LICENSING & REDEMPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-person dog licensing and redemption services. 723 NE Evans Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Licensing Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 1:30pm-3:30pm Dog Redemptions: By appointment only Email (503) 583-2780 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOOD RIVER COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services that include search and rescue operations, criminal investigations, public records requests, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal-based services including animal control, cat and dog licensing, and shelter information. 309 State Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 386-2711 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pet adoptions (all of which have been spayed and neutered), shelter, lost and found reporting program, HOPE Pet Food Bank, community cat program, and cremation services. Also offers Deschutes County dog licensing and renewal. Spay Neuter Assistance Program (SNAP) vouchers available that can be used at several different veterinary offices. 61170 SE 27th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5:30pm, additional times may be available by appointment Email (541) 382-3537 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a shelter for lost, stray, abandoned, or unwanted animals. Offers pet licensing, regulation compliance, and pet adoption. Accepts reports for animal bites. 5595 S Pacific Highway Phoenix, OR 97535 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 11am-4pm, Saturday-Sunday noon-4pm Email (541) 774-6654 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JOSEPHINE COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Protects individuals and animals, works to improve rabies vaccination rates, licenses dogs, enforces laws, and responds to humane complaints. Also operates a shelter that takes in and cares for cats and dogs and adopts out dogs, cats, puppies, and kittens. 1420 Brookside Boulevard Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 474-5458 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE KLAMATH COUNTY ANIMAL CONTROL ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal-based services including animal control, investigating cases of neglect, cat and dog licensing, and shelter information. 4250 Washburn Way Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Lobby hours: Monday-Friday noon-4pm Phone hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 882-1279 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services, licensing, investigating animal cruelty complaints, assisting injured/sick animals and reports of aggressive dog behavior. Offers a spay/neuter voucher program. 3050 N Delta Highway Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 682-3645 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the following services: -Enforces dog licensing and control ordinances -Promotes the humane treatment of dogs -Provides shelter and care for stray dogs until they are reunited with their families or adopted -Dog adoption and fostering 3550 Aumsville Highway SE Salem, OR 97317 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Dog Services: Monday-Friday noon-6pm, Saturday 10am-4pm Enforcement and Complaints: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Adoption: Tuesday/Thursday/Friday noon-6pm, Saturday 11am-3pm Email (503) 588-5233 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Picks up injured or aggressive animals and loose livestock, issues dog and cat licenses, investigates animal cruelty, and enforces animal control laws. Accepts stray animals from Multnomah County as space allows, and takes a limited number of owner-surrendered pets. Adoption services include vaccinations, exams, licenses, and spaying/neutering. Also removes dead stray animals and wildlife from public property. Volunteer opportunities are available, and donations are welcome. 1700 W Historic Columbia River Highway Troutdale, OR 97060 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Shelter: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 11am-5:30pm, Wednesday/Saturday/Sunday 11am-4:30pm Customer Service phone: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 11am-5:30pm, Wednesday 1pm-4:30pm, Saturday/Sunday 9am-4:30pm Animal-related emergency calls: 7 days per week 8am-5pm. Dial 911 for after-hours animal emergencies. Email (503) 988-7387 Get Directions Visit Website More Details POLK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services that include fingerprinting, search and rescue operations, criminal investigations, public records requests, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal control services, including pet licensing. 850 Main Street Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed holidays Email (503) 623-9251 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND ANIMAL WELFARE TEAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides veterinary health care clinics by appointment and access to a pet supply bank. Households can access the pet supply bank monthly without appointments or pre-qualification. Veterinary care is offered by appointments or walk-in pre-scheduled drop-in clinic dates. Dates of drop-in clinics are available on website and phone voicemail. Information can also be provided in person during regular hours. Does not offer emergency, urgent, or walk-in veterinary care outside of pre-scheduled drop-in clinic dates. At veterinary clinics, maximum of two pets per household will be seen. Services include: -Basic health exams -Vaccines -Flea and de-worming treatments -Pet supplies -Discounted animal licensing Accepts donations of new and gently used pet supplies and some medications. Check website for specific donation requirements. Cannot accept: Any food past one year of expiration, CBD treats or supplements, retractable leashes, shock collars, electric collars, or prong collars. Volunteer opportunities are available. 1718 NE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Pets of people who are experiencing homelessness or extreme poverty. Monthly income must be below the federal poverty level. Pets must be spayed/neutered or client must be willing to spay/neuter their pet. County Licensing: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington County residents Volunteers: Age 16 and older Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-3pm Veterinary care: By appointment only Vaccine and Wellness Clinics: Varies Email (503) 206-6033 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WASHINGTON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Picks up stray dogs, cares for stray pets until owners can be contacted, and finds homes for animals not picked up by owners. Provides removal of dead cats or dogs (from public property and roadways only). Investigates cruelty/neglect cases and provides community education about animal care/behavior. Provides dog and puppy licensing services. 1901 SE 24th Avenue MS 53 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Walk-in: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 846-7041 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIGHTSIDE ANIMAL CENTER BRIGHTSIDE ANIMAL CENTER CITY OF BOARDMAN ANIMAL CONTROL CITY OF EUGENE CITY OF EUGENE ANIMAL SERVICES CLACKAMAS COUNTY DOG SERVICES DOG SERVICES CROOK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE DOUGLAS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL GREENHILL HUMANE SOCIETY GREENHILL HUMANE SOCIETY HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY DOG LICENSING & REDEMPTION HOOD RIVER COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES JOSEPHINE COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER JOSEPHINE COUNTY ANIMAL SHELTER KLAMATH COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL LANE COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES LANE COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES POLK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE PORTLAND ANIMAL WELFARE TEAM PORTLAND ANIMAL WELFARE TEAM WASHINGTON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES ANIMAL SERVICES
